Id1.text: The ALV X-1 originated in the United States where the people are called Americans and include the ethnic group of White Americans.

Id2.text: The ALV X-1 is from the Us where Americans live and where White Americans are an ethnic group.

Id3.text: The country of origin of the ALV X-1 is the United States where the people are called Americans and White Americans are an ethnic group.
